records.ety: [L. epilepsia, Gr. <?/ a seizure, the “falling sickness,” fr. <?/ to take besides, seize, attack; 'epi` upon, besides + <?/ to take: cf. F. pilepsie. Cf. Catalepsy.]

defs: The “falling sickness,” so called because the patient falls suddenly to the ground; a disease characterized by paroxysms (or fits) occurring at interval and attended by sudden loss of consciousness, and convulsive motions of the muscles.
